name: novel_workflow_orchestrator
description: Orchestrates the complete web novel creation workflow from data scraping to final optimization. Chains all individual skills together for end-to-end automation. Invoke when user wants to run the full novel creation pipeline or automate the entire workflow.
instructions: Coordinate the execution of all novel creation skills in the proper sequence
Manage data flow between different stages of the workflow
Monitor progress and quality at each stage
Generate comprehensive reports on workflow execution and output quality
